title: Function Calling
summary: Guide to defining tools and letting models return structured function calls with validated arguments.
raw:
Function Calling

Function calling lets a model decide when to call a tool and return structured arguments that your application can execute.

Define each tool with a name, description, and JSON schema for arguments so the model knows what inputs are allowed.

Tool execution loop

Applications inspect the tool call, run the external function, and send the result back to the model for another response step.

{"name":"get_weather","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"city":{"type":"string"}}}}

This pattern is useful for assistants that browse data, call internal APIs, or chain multiple tool invocations.
